summary: Planned conservative one-action classification for five open PR inventory items. No GitHub mutations, closures, merges, labels, comments, or fix PRs are planned because the shard is not a dedupe cluster, low-signal closeout and fix/merge actions are disabled, and each PR has independent technical or maintainer-review context.

This is an independent small bug-fix PR, but the explicit real-behavior proof failure blocks any closeout or ready-for-maintainer recommendation in this plan shard.

The PR appears ready for maintainer review but changes a provider/plugin compatibility contract; job frontmatter requires human review for green checks, focused bug fixes, and technical correctness judgment.
Maintainer-owned stacked test migration with failing checks and non-main base requires maintainer decision; no close/merge/fix action is allowed in this job.

Large doctor/auth/session-state migration repair with sufficient proof still needs maintainer technical correctness and product-boundary review; no automation-safe closure or merge is available in plan mode.
